item.title: From Hugging Face to Amazon SageMaker Studio in one click
item.description: Focus: Hugging Face has a new AI-related update around 'From Hugging Face to Amazon SageMaker Studio in one click', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: Hugging Face Models on Foundry Managed Compute
item.description: Focus: Hugging Face has a new AI-related update around 'Hugging Face Models on Foundry Managed Compute', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: Run AI workloads on any cloud, store on Hugging Face: zero-egress storage with SkyPilot
item.description: Focus: Hugging Face has a new AI-related update around 'Run AI workloads on any cloud, store on Hugging Face: zero-egress storage with SkyPilot', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: AI Innovators Adopt NVIDIA Vera — Why Max Single-Threaded CPU at Scale Matters
item.description: Focus: Max single-threaded CPUs at scale are a new category of CPUs built for the agentic AI era. Across the creation and deployment of an agentic system, the CPU is on the critical path for reasoning, response time and learning. CPUs are the processor which executes the work the AI model commands:

item.title: NVIDIA and Hugging Face Bring New Models and Frameworks to LeRobot for the Open Robotics Community
item.description: Focus: Open source AI has shown how quickly developers can innovate when models, data and tools are shared. Robotics has the same opportunity, but advancements in physical AI development can still be gated by costly and fragmented resources, from large datasets and robot foundation models to simulat

item.title: Australian Payments Plus moves faster with ChatGPT and Codex
item.description: Focus: See how Australian Payments Plus uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to move faster through payments complexity. AP+ saves time, improves quality, and keeps human judgment central.

item.title: How tech workers are feeling in 2026: a workforce splitting in two
item.description: Focus: Results from our second annual tech worker sentiment survey

item.title: [AINews] The Field Guide to Fable
item.description: Focus: a quiet day lets us digest the world's most significant model launch... to date.

item.title: Vercel acquires Better Auth to accelerate open source auth
item.description: Focus: Vercel is acquiring Better Auth , the company behind the open source TypeScript authentication library , which has 4.7M+ weekly npm downloads and more than 850 contributors. Founder Bereket Engida and the core team are joining Vercel to continue their work on Better Auth and agent identity. T

item.title: Give your eve agent GitHub tools
item.description: Focus: GitHub Tools now ships an eve toolset through the new @github-tools/sdk/eve subpath. One file in agent/tools/ can register every GitHub tool, or use a preset such as maintainer , so you can build a complete GitHub agent in nine lines of code. Safe by default: Every write tool, such as mergePu

item.title: You can now view the Activity Log at a project-level
item.description: Focus: Project Settings now includes its own project-specific A ctivity Log . This view pulls the relevant user events from the Activity Log in Team Settings. Review project-level activity without leaving your project settings. Visit your project settings to try it out.

item.title: More granular observability for Vercel Sandbox
item.description: Focus: Vercel Sandbox observability now includes detailed resource metrics, giving you deeper visibility into how your sandboxes consume compute and networking. From the Observability tab in your dashboard, you can now monitor: Active CPU and CPU usage: Measures when your code actively uses the CPU.
